mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_ID as groupId, GROUP_NAME as groupName, INVITE_CODE as inviteCode, CATEGORY as category, STATUS as status, CREATED_AT as createdAt, UPDATED_AT as updatedAt FROM GROUPS WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT u.USER_ID as userId, u.NICKNAME as userName, u.EMAIL as userEmail, u.PROFILE_IMAGE as profileImg, gm.GROUP_ID as groupId, gm.GROUP_ROLE as groupRole, gm.JOINED_AT as joinedAt FROM GROUP_MEMBERS gm JOIN USERS u ON gm.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE gm.GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND gm.MEMBER_STATUS = 'JOINED' ORDER BY CASE WHEN gm.GROUP_ROLE = 'HOST' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, gm.JOINED_AT ASC
SELECT GROUP_ID as groupId, USER_ID as userId, GROUP_ROLE as groupRole, JOINED_AT as joinedAt FROM GROUP_MEMBERS WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM GROUP_MEMBERS WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_GROUP_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO GROUPS ( GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, INVITE_CODE, CATEGORY, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{groupId}, #{groupName}, #{inviteCode}, #{category}, 'ACTIVE', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO GROUP_MEMBERS ( MAPPING_ID, GROUP_ID, USER_ID, GROUP_ROLE, ACCOUNT_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_MAPPING_ID.NEXTVAL, #{groupId}, #{userId}, 'HOST', #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
INSERT INTO GROUP_ACCOUNT ( GROUP_ID, BANK_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BALANCE, PAYMENT_PASSWORD ) VALUES ( #{groupId}, #{bankCode}, #{accountNumber}, #{balance}, #{paymentPassword} )
mapper.select:
SELECT G.GROUP_ID as "groupId", G.GROUP_NAME as "groupName", G.INVITE_CODE as "inviteCode", G.CATEGORY as "category", G.STATUS as "status", NVL(GS.SUBSCRIPTION_FEE, 0) as "dueAmount", NVL(GS.DUE_DAY, 1) as "regularDay", NVL(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(GS.PENALTY_POLICY, 4000, 1), '0') as "penaltyAmount",
GA.ACCOUNT_NUMBER as "accountNumber", B.BANK_NAME as "bankName" FROM GROUPS G INNER JOIN GROUP_MEMBERS GM ON G.GROUP_ID = GM.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN GROUP_ACCOUNT GA ON G.GROUP_ID = GA.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN BANKS B ON GA.BANK_CODE = B.BANK_CODE LEFT JOIN GROUP_SETTINGS GS ON G.GROUP_ID = GS.GROUP_ID WHERE GM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND G.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND G.DELETED_AT IS NULL
SELECT GROUP_ID as groupId, GROUP_NAME as groupName, INVITE_CODE as inviteCode, CATEGORY as category, STATUS as status FROM GROUPS WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}

SELECT g.GROUP_ID as "groupId", g.GROUP_NAME as "groupName", g.CATEGORY as "category", u.NICKNAME as "hostName", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GROUP_MEMBERS WHERE GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'JOINED') as "memberCount" FROM GROUPS g JOIN GROUP_MEMBERS gm ON g.GROUP_ID = gm.GROUP_ID JOIN USERS u ON gm.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE g.INVITE_CODE = #{code} AND gm.GROUP_ROLE = 'HOST' AND g.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT * FROM GROUP_ACCOUNT WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MAPPING_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO GROUP_MEMBERS ( MAPPING_ID, GROUP_ID, USER_ID, GROUP_ROLE, MEMBER_STATUS, ACCOUNT_ID, JOINED_AT ) VALUES ( #{mappingId}, #{groupId}, #{userId}, #{groupRole}, 'JOINED', #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE GROUPS SET STATUS = 'INACTIVE', DELETED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
mapper.select: SELECT balance FROM GROUP_ACCOUNT WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
SELECT user_id FROM group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId}

SELECT t.TRANSACTION_ID as "transactionId", t.SOURCE_ACCOUNT_ID as "sourceAccountId", t.TARGET_ACCOUNT_ID as "targetAccountId", t.AMOUNT as "amount", t.TRANSACTION_TYPE as "transactionType", t.STATUS as "status", t.PAYMENT_REFERENCE_UID as "paymentReferenceUid", t.DESCRIPTION as "description", t.CREATED_AT as "createdAt", t.EXPENSE_ID as "expenseId" FROM TRANSACTIONS t INNER JOIN GROUP_ACCOUNT ga ON t.TARGET_ACCOUNT_ID = ga.ACCOUNT_ID WHERE ga.GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND t.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY t.CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT g.GROUP_ID as "groupId", g.GROUP_NAME as "groupName", g.CATEGORY as "category", ga.ACCOUNT_NUMBER as "accountNumber", b.BANK_NAME as "bankName", ga.BALANCE as "balance", NVL(gs.SUBSCRIPTION_FEE, 0) as "dueAmount", NVL(gs.DUE_DAY, 1) as "regularDay", NVL(gs.PENALTY_DAY, 0) as "penaltyDay", NVL(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(gs.PENALTY_POLICY, 4000, 1), '0') as "penaltyAmount" FROM GROUPS g LEFT JOIN GROUP_ACCOUNT GA ON g.GROUP_ID = ga.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN BANKS B ON ga.BANK_CODE = b.BANK_CODE LEFT JOIN GROUP_SETTINGS GS ON g.GROUP_ID = gs.GROUP_ID WHERE g.GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND g.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND g.DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT g.GROUP_ID as "groupId", g.GROUP_NAME as "groupName", g.CATEGORY as "category", gm.GROUP_ROLE as "groupRole", ga.BALANCE as "balance" FROM GROUP_MEMBERS gm INNER JOIN GROUPS g ON gm.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN GROUP_ACCOUNT ga ON g.GROUP_ID = ga.GROUP_ID WHERE gm.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT u.USER_ID as userId, u.NICKNAME as nickname, u.EMAIL as email, gm.GROUP_ROLE as role FROM USERS u JOIN GROUP_MEMBERS gm ON u.USER_ID = gm.USER_ID WHERE gm.GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND gm.MEMBER_STATUS = 'JOINED' ORDER BY CASE WHEN gm.GROUP_ROLE = 'HOST' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, u.NICKNAME ASC
SELECT USER_ID FROM GROUP_MEMBERS WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND GROUP_ROLE = 'HOST' AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'JOINED'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO GROUP_SETTINGS gs USING DUAL ON (gs.group_id = #{groupId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET subscription_fee = #{regularAmount}, due_day = #{regularDay}, is_use_penalty = 'Y', penalty_day = #{penaltyDay}, penalty_policy = #{penaltyAmount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (group_id, subscription_fee, due_day, is_use_penalty, penalty_day, penalty_policy, updated_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{regularAmount}, #{regularDay}, 'Y', #{penaltyDay}, #{penaltyAmount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATIONS (USER_ID, MESSAGE, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, IS_READ, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{message}, 'GROUP', #{groupId}, 'N', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT g.group_id as "groupId", m.user_id as "userId", g.group_name as "groupName", g.invite_code as "inviteCode", g.category, g.status, g.created_at as "createdAt" FROM groups g LEFT JOIN group_members m ON g.group_id = m.group_id WHERE g.group_id = #{groupId} AND m.group_role = 'HOST'

SELECT gm.group_id as groupId, gm.user_id as userId, u.user_name as userName, gm.group_role as groupRole FROM group_members gm JOIN users u ON gm.user_id = u.user_id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} AND gm.member_status = 'JOINED'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TRANSACTION_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRANSACTIONS ( TRANSACTION_ID, SOURCE_ACCOUNT_ID, TARGET_ACCOUNT_ID, AMOUNT, TRANSACTION_TYPE, STATUS, PAYMENT_REFERENCE_UID, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{transactionId}, #{sourceAccountId}, #{targetAccountId}, #{amount}, #{transactionType}, #{status}, #{paymentReferenceUid}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT EXPENSE_ID as "expenseId", GROUP_ID as "groupId", MERCHANT_NAME as "merchantName", AMOUNT as "amount", PAYMENT_ACCOUNT_TYPE as "paymentAccountType", TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as "createdAt" FROM EXPENSES WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
AND CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND CREATED_AT <= TO_DATE(#{endDate} || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN AMOUNT > 0 THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END), 0) as "totalDeposit", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN AMOUNT < 0 THEN ABS(AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END), 0) as "totalWithdraw" FROM EXPENSES WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}

SELECT UA.ACCOUNT_ID AS accountId, B.BANK_NAME AS bankName, UA.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS accountNumber, UA.IS_PRIMARY AS isDefault, UA.BALANCE AS balance FROM GROUP_MEMBERS GM JOIN USER_ACCOUNTS UA ON GM.ACCOUNT_ID = UA.ACCOUNT_ID LEFT JOIN BANKS B ON UA.BANK_CODE = B.BANK_CODE WHERE GM.GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND GM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND GM.ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL

SELECT t.TRANSACTION_ID AS "transactionId", t.SOURCE_ACCOUNT_ID AS "sourceAccountId", t.TARGET_ACCOUNT_ID AS "targetAccountId", CASE t.TRANSACTION_TYPE WHEN 'QR_PAYMENT' THEN -t.AMOUNT WHEN 'AUTO_TRANSFER' THEN -t.AMOUNT ELSE t.AMOUNT END AS "amount", t.TRANSACTION_TYPE AS "transactionType", t.STATUS AS "status", t.PAYMENT_REFERENCE_UID AS "paymentReferenceUid", t.DESCRIPTION AS "description", t.CREATED_AT AS "createdAt", ga.BALANCE AS "balanceAfter", t.EXPENSE_ID AS "expenseId", CASE t.TRANSACTION_TYPE WHEN 'AUTO_TRANSFER' THEN '자동이체' WHEN 'QR_PAYMENT' THEN 'QR결제' WHEN 'V_ACCOUNT_DEPOSIT'THEN '회비입금' WHEN 'MANUAL_TRANSFER' THEN '수동이체' ELSE '일반' END AS "category" FROM TRANSACTIONS t INNER JOIN GROUP_ACCOUNT ga ON t.TARGET_ACCOUNT_ID = ga.ACCOUNT_ID WHERE ga.GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND t.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND t.CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND t.CREATED_AT < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 ORDER BY t.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT AMOUNT FROM TRANSACTIONS WHERE TRANSACTION_ID = #{transactionId}
